description_long: This is a compact, single-seat military jet aircraft with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a sharply pointed nose. The airplane features a delta wing configuration with low-mounted, swept-back wings and prominent roundels and insignia, suggesting military use, possibly modeled after the Mikoyan-Gurevich MiG-21. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer with a swept-back design and a horizontal stabilizer mounted low on the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a clear canopy that opens upward. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The exterior is finished in a matte gray color with blue, white, and red roundels and fin flashes, and the jet engine exhaust is visible at the rear.
description: A compact, single-seat military jet with a delta wing, swept tail, and tricycle landing gear, finished in matte gray with military insignia.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open cockpit canopy, swept delta wing, and tricycle landing gear with visible insignia on the tail and wing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the delta wing shape, single jet exhaust, and symmetrical placement of roundels on the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the cockpit canopy open, clear view of the swept tail and landing gear, and visible insignia.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the low-mounted delta wings extending outward.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted delta wings with a swept-back design and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single swept vertical stabilizer and low-mounted horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a clear upward-opening canopy.
